name: edit_file
description: Replace an exact string in a file with new content. The old_string must match exactly (including whitespace/indentation). Fails if old_string is not unique unless replace_all is true.

path.description: Absolute path to the file to edit

old_string.description: The exact text to find and replace

replace_all.description: Replace all occurrences (default: false, replaces first only)
